domain: Information visualization, interactive graphics, perception-aware design, hyperbolic geometry, dashboards, and visual storytelling
research_areas: Visual encoding effectiveness and perception ranking
Color theory for accessible and perceptually uniform palettes
Interactive visualization patterns and D3.js techniques
Cognitive load and bias in data presentation
curriculum: Visual encoding channels — position, length, color, shape, area
Chart type selection by data relationship
Tufte's data-ink ratio and chartjunk avoidance
Color scales — sequential, diverging, categorical, colorblind-safe
Interaction patterns — overview+detail, brushing, semantic zoom
Perception principles — preattentive processing, Gestalt, Weber's law
Hyperbolic visualization — Poincaré disk, focus+context, plunge navigation
Accessibility — WCAG contrast, colorblind simulation, screen readers
Animated transitions — object constancy, interpolation, easing
Bias detection — misleading axes, truncation, cherry-picking
SVG vs Canvas vs WebGL — when to use each
